redacted_summary: A team-scope support memory was sanitized by replacing person-specific escalation targets, dated attributions, and internal service references with role-based routing guidance. The reusable outcome is a generic triage pattern: route specialized installation, connectivity, bot-access, quota, and integration issues to the appropriate owner role, while using standardized user-facing guidance for known self-service cases. Verification signal: no personal names, internal links, exact dates, IDs, or team-private routing details remain.
